comments.body:
Renamed SliderUtils to to ServiceUtils,
And fixed some loggings to be less verbose

The patch looks good overall. The logging when persisting a service should happen for create and build, but I think it only happens for create after this patch. You could move the log statement to createDirAndPersistApp, or just repeat the log statement in the actionBuild method. I noticed actionStart is calling createDirAndPersistApp, but it could probably just call persistAppDef since the directory must already be created before start is called.

Thanks Billie, 
bq.  You could move the log statement to createDirAndPersistApp
done 
bq. actionStart is calling createDirAndPersistApp, but it could probably just call persistAppDef
changed to use persisteApp and add a log line for in this method.

The patch looks good overall. The logging when persisting a service should happen for create and build, but I think it only happens for create after this patch.
